adhkar.translation: We have reached the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Acknowledging Allah's sovereignty at the start of the day

adhkar.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna
adhkar.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning, and by You we enter the evening.
adhkar.benefit: Starting the day with Allah's name

adhkar.translation: We have entered the morning upon the natural religion of Islam.
adhkar.benefit: Affirming one's faith each morning

adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is due to Him.
adhkar.benefit: Sins will be forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea

adhkar.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
adhkar.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah
adhkar.translation: There is no deity except Allah alone, with no partner.
adhkar.benefit: Protection and reward for freeing slaves

adhkar.translation: We have reached the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Acknowledging Allah's sovereignty at the end of the day

adhkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَمْسَى بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ
adhkar.transliteration: Allahumma ma amsa bi min ni'matin famink
adhkar.translation: O Allah, whatever blessing I have received this evening is from You.
adhkar.benefit: Expressing gratitude for blessings

adhkar.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being.
adhkar.benefit: Seeking Allah's protection in all matters

adhkar.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
adhkar.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimati-llahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
adhkar.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
adhkar.benefit: Protection from all evil

adhkar.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
adhkar.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing can cause harm.
adhkar.benefit: Nothing will harm you

adhkar.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Seeking forgiveness after prayer

adhkar.translation: O Allah, You are Peace and from You is peace.
adhkar.benefit: Seeking peace after prayer

adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Glorifying Allah

adhkar.translation: All praise is due to Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Praising Allah

adhkar.translation: Allah is the Greatest.
adhkar.benefit: Magnifying Allah, completes 100 with SubhanAllah and Alhamdulillah

adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah the Magnificent, and all praise is due to Him.
adhkar.benefit: A palm tree is planted in Paradise for each recitation

adhkar.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
adhkar.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
adhkar.translation: There is no power or strength except with Allah.
adhkar.benefit: A treasure from the treasures of Paradise

adhkar.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is due to Allah.
adhkar.benefit: Fills the scales on the Day of Judgment

adhkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
adhkar.transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim 'ala nabiyyina Muhammad
adhkar.translation: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
adhkar.benefit: Allah sends 10 blessings upon you for each one

adhkar.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance.
adhkar.benefit: Seeking continuous forgiveness throughout the day

adhkar.translation: The Verse of the Throne (Al-Baqarah 2:255)
adhkar.benefit: Protection by Allah until morning/evening

adhkar.translation: Surah Al-Ikhlas (Say, 'He is Allah, [who is] One')
adhkar.benefit: Protection from all evil

adhkar.translation: Surah Al-Falaq (Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak')
adhkar.benefit: Protection from external evil

adhkar.translation: Surah An-Nas (Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind')
adhkar.benefit: Protection from internal evil and whispers
